allow: Bash(xargs wc *)
Bash(cargo build *)
Bash(cargo test *)
Bash(cargo clippy *)
Bash(awk '{print $NF}')
Bash(git add *)
Bash(git rm *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: Wave 1 infrastructure — tokenizer, model metadata, Groq provider, CLI modules *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: display engine, system prompt builder, /compact, Ctrl+C handling *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: streaming tool calls, Anthropic tool_use support, markdown renderer *)
Bash(git commit -m 'docs: update README with current features, add CHANGELOG *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(runtime\): provider registry with configs for all 22 providers *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(cli-core\): credential pool with failover and round-robin *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: Wave 2 — generic provider, Gemini, credential pool, usage tracking *)
Bash(git checkout *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(runtime\): individual provider factories for DeepSeek, Ollama, Azure, OpenRouter *)
Bash(awk 'NR>=580 && NR<=600' crates/runtime/src/agent/mod.rs)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: skills system, usage accumulator wired, provider registry integration *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(cli-core\): wire CredentialPool into provider key resolution *)
Bash(git commit *)
